elements.name: Description
texts:
Oughtcarn is in the Electoral Division of Templecarn, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

The Irish name for Oughtcarn is Ucht Caoin

Oughtcarn is on Logainm.ie: Oughtcarn.
Oughtcarn has an area of:

    -4,242,417 m² / 424.24 hectares / 4.2424 km²
    -1.64 square miles
    -1048.32 acres / 1048 acres, 1 rood, 11 perches

Nationwide, it is the 2352nd largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 241st largest townland
